diagnosis.final_diagnosis: Severely depressed left ventricular systolic function (LVEF=20%) secondary to global hypokinesis and pacemaker-induced dyssynchrony
diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: The left ventricular ejection fraction is markedly reduced, as seen on TTE, indicating severely depressed left ventricular systolic function. It is noted to be secondary to global hypokinesis and pacemaker-induced dyssynchrony, with additional findings of moderate mitral regurgitation.
